dashboard.title: Cases
dashboard.subtitle: Your diagnostic history
dashboard.emptyStateDesc: Start your first case by uploading patient data across one or more clinical modalities.

intake.title: New case
intake.subtitle: Submit any combination of clinical inputs — Lumina handles the rest.
intake.notesDesc: Enter clinical notes, patient history, symptom descriptions, or consultation summaries.
intake.notesPlaceholder: Patient is a 6-year-old male presenting with febrile seizures onset at 5 months. EEG shows irregular spike-wave complexes. Developmental regression noted after first seizure cluster. Family history of epilepsy on maternal side...
intake.charCount: characters · AI NER extracts HPO terms
intake.photoDesc: Upload a clinical photograph for AI vision analysis.
intake.labDesc: Upload a lab report image or PDF screenshot for OCR + AI interpretation.
intake.vcfDesc: Upload a VCF file from whole-exome or whole-genome sequencing.
intake.vcfNote: Pathogenic/likely-pathogenic variants are resolved through gene → disease → HPO chains.
intake.tipBody: More modalities raise the confidence ceiling. One input caps at 40% — all four unlock 80%.
intake.errorNoInput: Add at least one input to analyze
intake.errorNoHpo: No HPO phenotypes extracted — try adding more detail
intake.errorApiFailed: Analysis failed — is the API running?
intake.warmingUp: API warming up — first request may take 15–30s…

case.notFoundSub: This case may have expired from storage.
case.topDiscriminating: Top discriminating phenotypes for this diagnosis

disease.notFoundSub: {orpha} could not be found in the database.

landing.heroSub: Five modalities. One AI. Answers for the undiagnosed.
landing.workflowHeadline: From input to insight in seconds.
landing.workflowSub: Lumina's pipeline extracts phenotypic signals from every modality and matches them against the world's largest rare disease ontology.
landing.step1Desc: Submit clinical notes, photos, lab reports, or genetic data — any combination works.
landing.step2Desc: Our models identify Human Phenotype Ontology terms from every modality with confidence scores.
landing.step3Desc: Resnik/Lin semantic similarity ranks diseases by phenotypic overlap in under 100ms.
landing.step4Desc: AI drafts a specialist referral letter summarizing the diagnosis and evidence.
landing.technologyHeadline: Five ways to see what others miss.
landing.technologySub: Every clinical signal captured. Every phenotype extracted. One unified diagnosis.
landing.modalityNoteDesc: Advanced NER extracts HPO phenotypes from free-text clinical documentation using Groq / Llama 3.3 70B.
landing.modalityPhotoDesc: Vision AI identifies facial dysmorphology and clinical phenotypes from patient photos.
landing.modalityLabDesc: OCR combined with AI interprets abnormal lab values and maps them to HPO terms.
landing.modalityDnaDesc: VCF files parsed for pathogenic variants; gene-disease-phenotype chains resolved.
landing.modalityChatDesc: Unstructured specialist observations converted to structured phenotype profiles.
landing.poweredByDesc: Claude Sonnet extracts phenotypes with clinical precision.
landing.scienceHeadline: Built on the world's largest rare disease graph.
landing.hpoOntologyDesc: Human Phenotype Ontology with information content scoring
landing.clinvarDesc: Pathogenic variant → gene → disease resolution chain
landing.ctaSub: Join clinical teams using Lumina to reach diagnoses faster and more accurately.
